caption: The video captures a live performance or presentation in front of an audience. A woman with short gray hair, wearing a turquoise top and a colorful scarf, stands on stage holding a book titled "Local Lore." She appears to be speaking or singing, gesturing expressively with her hands. Beside her, a man with long dark hair tied back, wearing glasses, a white shirt, and a black vest, plays a guitar. He is focused on his instrument, strumming and looking down at it. The audience, visible in the foreground, is attentively watching the performers. The setting seems to be indoors, with wooden blinds covering the windows in the background, suggesting a cozy and intimate atmosphere. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the name of the event or organization.
